scripts.start: npx concurrently --names BACKEND,FRONTEND --prefix-colors cyan,green "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.start:agent: npx concurrently --names BACKEND,FRONTEND,AGENT --prefix-colors cyan,green,yellow "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm run dev --prefix agent"
scripts.dev: npx concurrently --names BACKEND,FRONTEND --prefix-colors cyan,green "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.dev:all: npx concurrently --names BACKEND,FRONTEND,ADMIN --prefix-colors cyan,green,magenta "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm run dev --prefix admin"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix agent && npm install --prefix admin
